title: asyncinject 0.7 发布
full_text:
Release: asyncinject 0.7
Simon Willison’s Weblog
Subscribe
Sponsored by: AWS — If you're building with AI, AWS Summit NYC on June 17 is the room you want to be in. 200+ sessions. Totally free. Register here
11th June 2026
Release
asyncinject 0.7
— Run async workflows using pytest-fixtures-style dependency injection
I built this utility library to support an asyncio dependency injection pattern a few years ago. I was using it with Datasette and Claude Fable 5 spotted some bugs in the dependency which it then fixed for me. It's a very proactive model!
Posted 11th June 2026 at 6:28 am
Recent articles
Claude Fable is relentlessly proactive - 11th June 2026
